name: claude-code-sound-notifier
description: Plays a sound whenever Claude Code needs your attention (permission requests, idle prompts, task completion).

commands.title: Claude Code Notifier: Install Claude Code Hooks
Claude Code Notifier: Remove Claude Code Hooks
Claude Code Notifier: Play a Test Sound
Claude Code Notifier: Toggle Notifications On/Off
Claude Code Notifier: Open Sounds Folder

claudeCodeNotifier.showToast.description: Also show a VS Code notification toast alongside the sound.

enumDescriptions: Only play a sound when the event's working directory matches this window's workspace (avoids duplicate sounds across multiple open windows).
Play a sound in every open window for every event.
claudeCodeNotifier.workspaceScope.description: Controls which VS Code window plays the sound when multiple windows are open.

claudeCodeNotifier.sounds.permission.description: Sound file for permission requests. A bare filename resolves to the bundled 'sounds' folder; an absolute path is used as-is.

claudeCodeNotifier.sounds.idle.description: Sound file for idle prompts (Claude is waiting for input).

claudeCodeNotifier.sounds.stop.description: Sound file played when Claude finishes responding.

claudeCodeNotifier.sounds.generic.description: Fallback sound for any other notification type.

claudeCodeNotifier.playStopSound.description: Play a sound when Claude finishes responding (the Stop hook fires on every turn, so this can be frequent).

claudeCodeNotifier.customPlayerCommand.description: Optional. Override the OS audio player. Use {file} as a placeholder for the sound path, e.g. 'ffplay -nodisp -autoexit {file}'. Leave empty to auto-detect.

claudeCodeNotifier.hookScope.description: Where to install hooks: 'user' (~/.claude/settings.json, applies everywhere) or 'project' (./.claude/settings.json in the current workspace).
